form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign winning won by 2 len Saint-Cloud G1 Criterium de Saint-Cloud October 26 over 2000m slow track defeating A Boy Named Susie carrying 57kg at $1.70. On debut fourth of 8 at this track July 24 over 1609m, 8 len behind Hardy Warrior carrying 60.5kg at $9. Hard to beat on his latest effort.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation second of 10 at Saint-Cloud in the G1 Criterium de Saint-Cloud October 26 over 2000m, soft track; 2 len behind Pierre Bonnard carrying 57kg at $15. At his first start won by 3 len Killarney July 16 over 1609m slow track defeating Bellamano with 61kg at $4.30. Terrific chance to find winning form.

form.formComment: Resuming. Not seen since winning to post a big 6 len win. Curragh November 2 over 1609m in the wet defeating Cannes with 59kg at $3.30. On debut second of 13 at Navan October 8 over 1609m, 0.5 len behind Sugar Goodson carrying 60.5kg at $3.30. Hard to fault form and can measure up again.
